name: ApplicableDiscount
description:
A wrapper object that contains information about a discount that you
can apply to an order, and which checks or menu item selections
you can apply it to.

discount.description:
A `ToastReference` object containing the identifiers of the discount.
Response only.

applicableChecks.description:
If the discount is applicable to a check, this value holds an
array of `ExternalReference` objects containing the identifiers of the checks.

applicableSelections.description:
If the discount is applicable to a menu item selection, this
value holds an array of `ExternalReference` objects containing
the identifiers of the menu items.

ToastReference.description: A wrapper object with fields that allow reference to a Toast entity by Toast GUID.

guid.description: The GUID maintained by the Toast platform.

entityType.description: The type of object this is. Response only.

ToastReference.name: ToastReference

ExternalReference.description: A wrapper object with fields that allow reference to a Toast platform entity by Toast GUID or a partner's identifier.

externalId.description: External identifier string that is prefixed by the naming authority. You can use the orders API to set an `externalId` for an order and then GET the order with that `externalId`.

ExternalReference.name: ExternalReference
